title: Column default value not working anymore
excerpt:
Hello, 
we experience an issue across all boards for about a week now. Column default values from linked boards are not set anymore for new tasks accross all boards. 
  
Is that a known issue? 
thanks 
Sergei

posts.author: sleginkov (Sergei Leginkov)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: sleginkov (Sergei Leginkov)
posts.cookedHtml: For now this issue seems to be resolved. The default values are working as before now.
